summary: Build a sales forecast using pipeline data, historical close rates, and deal-level analysis for revenue planning.

inputs.name: pipeline_data
inputs.description: Current pipeline with stage, amount, close date, and deal details.

inputs.name: historical_close_rates
inputs.description: Historical close rates by stage, segment, and time period.

outputs.name: deal_level_assessment
outputs.description: Individual deal confidence analysis for top opportunities.

outputs.name: risk_upside_analysis
outputs.description: Identified risks and upside opportunities in the forecast.

budget.notes: Focus on data-driven forecast with clear assumptions.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is sales forecasting, not financial accounting or market projection.
Require pipeline data and historical close rates before building forecast.
Return forecast model, deal-level assessment, and risk analysis in one consistent output.

steps.action: Validate pipeline data quality and stage accuracy.
Apply historical close rates to build stage-weighted forecast.
Assess deal-level confidence for top opportunities.
Identify forecast risks and upside opportunities.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read pipeline data, historical close rates, and deal details.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save forecast model and analysis reports.

verification.method: Check that pipeline data quality is assessed before forecasting.
Check that historical close rates are applied by stage and segment.
Check that forecast risks and upside are documented.

success_criteria: The forecast uses stage-weighted pipeline with historical close rates.
Top opportunities have deal-level confidence assessments.
Forecast risks and upside opportunities are documented.

rollback.when: If the forecast uses unvalidated pipeline data or ignores close rates, roll back to source data and rerun.
